summary: Iteration 30: Testing Pinnwand Layout (20px gap, horizontal grid, icons) and Editor Link Dialog (Einfügemodus with Link/Embed options). All 8 features tested successfully - 100% pass rate.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: RichTextEditor.jsx has ESLint warning about missing dependencies in useCallback (line 476) - tableCols, tableRows, tableWithHeader
seed_data_creation: Used existing Pinnwand categories (TEST_Pinnwand_UI_Cat, NEWS, SPECIALS) and documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: (1) Pinnwand uses grid layout with 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5' for horizontal arrangement with 20px gaps. (2) Max 3 containers per row on large screens (lg:grid-cols-3). (3) NEWS container displays Newspaper icon, SPECIALS container displays Sparkles icon via getPinnwandIcon() function. (4) Editor Link Dialog shows 'Einfügemodus' section when document is selected. (5) Radio options 'Link einfügen' and 'Einbetten (Viewer)' are present. (6) Info box with amber styling appears when 'Einbetten (Viewer)' is selected, showing text about interactive viewer embedding.

pinnwand_grid_layout.details: Grid uses 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5' classes

pinnwand_gap_20px.details: gap-5 class provides 20px (1.25rem) spacing between containers

pinnwand_max_3_per_row.details: lg:grid-cols-3 ensures max 3 containers per row on large screens

pinnwand_news_icon.details: NEWS container displays Newspaper icon from lucide-react

pinnwand_specials_icon.details: SPECIALS container displays Sparkles icon from lucide-react

editor_einfugemodus_section.details: 'Einfügemodus' label appears when document is selected in Link Dialog

editor_link_embed_options.details: Radio options 'Link einfügen' and 'Einbetten (Viewer)' are present

editor_embed_info_box.details: Info box with amber styling appears when 'Einbetten (Viewer)' is selected, showing: 'Das Dokument wird als interaktiver Viewer direkt im Artikel eingebettet. Leser können das Dokument durchblättern, ohne die Seite zu verlassen.'

screenshots: .screenshots/iter30_pinnwand_layout.png - Pinnwand tab with 3 containers (TEST_Pinnwand_UI_Cat, NEWS, SPECIALS) in horizontal grid
.screenshots/iter30_link_dialog_doc_tab.png - Link dialog Document tab with folder navigation
